preToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$input | ForEach-Object { $entry = @{ timestamp = (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'); data = $_ } | ConvertTo-Json; $entry | Add-Content -Path 'C:\Users\Ivanb\Documents\Git\media-viewer-webapp\lab-1\agent_log.txt' -Encoding UTF8 }"
